title: stelis major
intro: Stelis major, also known as Stelis erecta, is a type of orchid plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis major include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Stelis major can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
